'''dasufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:scaleout|scaleout]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-s-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:scaleout|scaleout]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dasufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæsifith|dæsifith]] || [[word:dæsifij|dæsifij]] || [[word:dæsifish|dæsifish]] || [[word:dæsifi|dæsifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dasusufuth|dasusufuth]] || [[word:dasusufuj|dasusufuj]] || [[word:dasusufush|dasusufush]] || [[word:dasusufu|dasusufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dasufuth|dasufuth]] || [[word:dasufuj|dasufuj]] || [[word:dasufush|dasufush]] || [[word:dasufu|dasufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dasuffuth|dasuffuth]] || [[word:dasuffuj|dasuffuj]] || [[word:dasuffush|dasuffush]] || [[word:dasuffuf|dasuffuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dasufuthu|dasufuthu]] || [[word:dasufuju|dasufuju]] || [[word:dasufushu|dasufushu]] || [[word:dasufuku|dasufuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dasufuth|dasufuth]] || [[word:dasufuj|dasufuj]] || [[word:dasufush|dasufush]] || [[word:dasufu|dasufu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dasufuthul|dasufuthul]] || [[word:dasufujul|dasufujul]] || [[word:dasufushul|dasufushul]] || [[word:dasufukul|dasufukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dasufuthuthu|dasufuthuthu]] || [[word:dasufujuju|dasufujuju]] || [[word:dasufushushu|dasufushushu]] || [[word:dasufuku|dasufuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dasufuthun|dasufuthun]] || [[word:dasufujun|dasufujun]] || [[word:dasufushun|dasufushun]] || [[word:dasufukun|dasufukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dasufuthuoro|dasufuthuoro]] || [[word:dasufujuoro|dasufujuoro]] || [[word:dasufushuoro|dasufushuoro]] || [[word:dasufukuoro|dasufukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
